reviews.comment:
Se carga nafta y el personal es muy atento. Podes revisar el aire de las gomas. Comprar accesorios del auto y te los colocan al instante, etc. También reabrió el lavadero con nuevas máquinas.  Creo que le falta ajuste  a las máquinas y el secado manual un desastre, nadie controla al personal. Uno de los precio para socios 250.

(Translated by Google)
You can fill up with gas and the staff is very attentive. You can check your tire pressure. You can buy car accessories and they'll install them instantly, etc. The car wash has also reopened with new machines. I think the machines need adjusting and the manual drying is a disaster; nobody supervises the staff. One of the prices for members is 250.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3ODRTcTZ3RRAB
